topic: Everything in my refrigerator has the same expiration date a few weeks in the future
title: Everything in My Refrigerator Expires on the Exact Same Day | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: Everything in my refrigerator expires on the same exact day. I bought it all weeks apart.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a refrigerator interior packed with food items, a carton of milk in the foreground with a date stamp visible, dim fridge light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I live alone. I shop once a week. Different stores, different days.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a small dim kitchen at night, a refrigerator with its door closed, single overhead bulb, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a coffee mug on a kitchen counter beside an open refrigerator casting light, dim early morning, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The milk, the eggs, the bread. All stamped the same date. October fourth.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a milk carton, an egg box, and a bread bag arranged on a counter, each with a printed date stamp, dim kitchen light, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of hands holding a food jar turning it to read a stamped expiration date, dim kitchen light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Forty items. One date. Cans, jars, everything.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a kitchen counter covered with dozens of grocery items all turned label out, dim overhead light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I drove out and bought a fresh carton.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a fresh milk carton on a store checkout counter, fluorescent light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: At home, the stamp had changed. October fourth.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a milk carton date stamp reading a single date, held in a hand under dim kitchen light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then the date on my medication bottle. Then my passport. October fourth.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an amber medication bottle and a passport lying on a wooden table, dim lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: This morning my phone calendar had one event that day. No title. Just my name.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a phone screen showing a calendar with a single unlabeled event highlighted on a date, dim room light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: October fourth is a Saturday. It is three weeks away.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a wall calendar with one date circled in dark ink, dim kitchen light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Everything I own agrees on the day. I am the only one who disagrees.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a dim kitchen at night, the refrigerator closed, the room still and empty, vertical 9:16 framing
